rollback_policy.description: A local release is refused if its phase rank is older than release-history.json latest_version or if its key_id is not trusted.

releases.notes: Rollback protection, key-id trust metadata, and advisory update check.
Phase 8 local-only recovery snapshots, checksum sidecars, safe archive verification, recovery drill, and human restore plans.

releases.summary: First-run activation guide, seven-day onboarding path, and activation readiness checker.
Public Launch Pack assets and launch readiness checker for safe no-PHI sharing.
Cohort / Instructor Mode assets and readiness checker for safe no-PHI, non-certifying facilitation.
EDENA Evidence Trail assets and readiness checker for no-PHI evidence of learning without certification claims.
NIN Community Contribution Flow assets and readiness checker for sanitized, human-reviewed contributions without endorsement or clinical claims.
Institutional Pilot Pack assets and readiness checker for non-clinical small-group adoption without deployment, endorsement, compliance, or certification claims.
EDENA Micro-Credential Readiness Pack for formative human review without certification, badges, clinical-readiness, competency, or automatic scoring claims.
NAIO Agent Registry Pack for human-reviewed learning listings without endorsement, procurement, deployment, clinical-readiness, or automatic listing claims.

doctrine: Agents propose. Humans judge. Nurses steward.
